title: EIA: US Ethanol Output
content: Ethanol production in the United States averaged 1.093 million barrels per day (bpd), up 12,000 bpd week-on-week and 21,000 bpd, or 2.4%, higher than in the same week last year, according to data released by the Energy Information Administration (EIA). Four-week average output at 1.087 million bpd was 1,000 bpd above the same four weeks last year.Midwest ethanol production averaged 1.034 million bpd, up 13,000 bpd week-on-week and 20,000 bpd, or 1.9%, higher than in the same week last year. Four-week average output at 1.03 million bpd was 5,000 bpd above the same four weeks last year.
author: Analysts Account
